task_completion.description: Create a folder named 'Dev Tools' on the Favorites Bar
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Dev Tools' is visible on the Microsoft Edge Favorites Bar or within the Favorites manager interface.
A bookmark named 'Repo' is visible inside the 'Dev Tools' folder. If the URL is visible (e.g., in the edit dialog or manager), it should point to https://github.com.
A bookmark named 'Help' is visible inside the 'Dev Tools' folder. If the URL is visible, it should point to https://stackoverflow.com.
A bookmark named 'Build' is visible inside the 'Dev Tools' folder. If the URL is visible, it should point to https://www.jenkins.io.

task_completion.description: Configure Edge to open GitHub on startup
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Edge Settings page for 'Start, home, and new tabs' is open, with the 'Open these pages' option selected and 'https://github.com' listed as the startup page.

task_completion.description: Export favorites to the specified HTML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'initial_setup.html' is visible in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory in a file manager or terminal, or the Edge 'Save As' dialog is shown exporting the favorites to this exact path.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Microsoft Edge GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Microsoft Edge browser window being actively used to add bookmarks and change settings, rather than modifying configuration files via terminal.

integrity.description: Agent used the browser's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The export file should be created using Edge's built-in 'Export favorites' menu/dialog, not by manually creating a text file or using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using sqlite3 or python scripts in the terminal to directly inject bookmarks into Edge's underlying database files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder: 'Dev Tools' on the Favorites Bar. Required bookmarks inside the folder: 'Repo' (https://github.com), 'Help' (https://stackoverflow.com), and 'Build' (https://www.jenkins.io). Startup page must be set to https://github.com. Exported favorites file must be named 'initial_setup.html' and located in /home/ga/Documents.
